diagnostic_scope: Verify that the current B2 step can proceed artifact-only from the committed B1/B3 plan baseline.

proposed_next_repair_boundaries: Decide in a follow-up active-context artifact-only repair whether the canonical mirror contract should point to archive/derived_mirrors/* or return to tracked repo-root mirrors; do not mix both.

If the active-context contract is normalized, scope that repair to ACTIVE_CONTEXT_SCHEMA.json, scripts/assert_mirror_sync.py, and the minimum documentation/ledger surfaces needed inside this repository only.
Any change that touches Project_ARIS tests, workspace checkout logic, or full-suite remediation acceptance criteria remains out of scope here and still requires explicit operator command.

artifact_sha256.self_hash_limitation: The terminal file sha256 is reported externally after write because a file cannot embed its own final sha256 without self-reference drift.
